entity.summary: Luxembourg-based centralized exchange launched in 2011 and still operating under the Bitstamp brand.
entity.notes: Bitstamp's official exchange and About Us surfaces were accessible and verified on June 23, 2026.

changes.notes: Bitstamp's official exchange and About Us surfaces were accessible and verified on June 23, 2026.

events.title: Bitstamp began operating in 2011
events.description: Bitstamp was founded and began operating as a European-focused bitcoin exchange in 2011.
events.notes: The canonical entity stores the launch at year precision; this event preserves that precision.

events.title: Bitstamp suspended service after a hot-wallet breach
events.description: Bitstamp took its exchange offline after a security breach resulted in the theft of fewer than 19,000 BTC from an operational wallet. Customer balances were stated to remain fully covered, and trading resumed several days later.
events.notes: The incident was material but did not end the exchange.

evidence.title: About Bitstamp
evidence.notes: Official company page used for Bitstamp identity and continued-operation context.

evidence.title: Robinhood bets big on crypto with $200 million deal for Bitstamp
evidence.notes: Independent corroboration that Bitstamp was founded in 2011.

evidence.title: Major Bitcoin Exchange Bitstamp Goes Offline After Possible Hack
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous reporting of the breach, service suspension and amount stolen.

evidence.title: Hackers Steal $5 Million From Bitcoin Exchange
evidence.notes: Secondary corroboration that approximately 19,000 BTC were stolen and customer balances would be honored.
